summary: Poor-quality audience taping with little musical merit, eclipsed by better recordings.
review: Both reviewers rate this release at the lowest level, criticizing the recording as a low‑fidelity Walkman capture that offers no value compared to other available versions. No positive comments about the performance are made, indicating the show itself is not considered noteworthy.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 1‑star reviews highlight terrible recording quality and lack of musical interest; rating reflects combined poor show and technical aspects.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recorded on a Walkman, resulting in low fidelity, muffled sound with no clear mix; essentially an amateur personal tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
